title: Syrian Peppery Crumble Frittata
description: A flavorful frittata filled with the warmth of Syrian spices and the crunch of a peppery crumble.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together eggs and a pinch of salt.
Add the chopped Syrian pepper to the egg mixture and stir well.
Pour the egg mixture into a greased 9-inch pie dish.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese over the egg mixture.
Top the frittata with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the crumble is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
